name: Sisters boyfriend
description:
♱ Everything he does with her, is for you, his sweet, sweet treasure . ᴍ4ᴍ

♡ . . . Soohan has never really been interest in your sister, even though he did willingly agree to date her, and despite how he is willingly playing the role of the perfect boyfriend. It's all for you. Everything he does with her, is for you, his sweet, sweet treasure.
creator: kissesformilo
